# Kommun Monitor
> AI-powered summaries of municipal decisions in Örebro, Sweden

Kommun Monitor automatically reads public meeting protocols (PDF) from Örebro municipality,
summarizes each decision using AI, analyzes voting patterns per party, and publishes
structured data as a free, searchable website and JSON API.

## Key Pages

- [https://kommun-monitor.se/](About): Homepage with all decisions searchable and filterable
- [https://kommun-monitor.se/parti/](https://kommun-monitor.se/parti/): Voting statistics for all 9 parties in Örebro
- [https://kommun-monitor.se/omrade/](https://kommun-monitor.se/omrade/): Decisions organized by geographic area
- [https://kommun-monitor.se/ekonomi/](https://kommun-monitor.se/ekonomi/): Budget and financial decisions tracker
- [https://kommun-monitor.se/insikter/](https://kommun-monitor.se/insikter/): Automated political insights and power analysis

## API (Free, No Authentication)

- [https://kommun-monitor.se/api/v1/decisions.json](https://kommun-monitor.se/api/v1/decisions.json): All decisions with voting data
- [https://kommun-monitor.se/api/v1/parties.json](https://kommun-monitor.se/api/v1/parties.json): Party statistics and alliances
- [https://kommun-monitor.se/api/v1/insights.json](https://kommun-monitor.se/api/v1/insights.json): Power analysis, unusual coalitions, trends
- [https://kommun-monitor.se/api/v1/docs/](https://kommun-monitor.se/api/v1/docs/): Full API documentation

## Key Facts

- Municipality: Örebro kommun, Sweden (population 163,000)
- Governing coalition: S + M + C (majority wins 100% of votes)
- Data source: Public protocols from orebro.se (offentlighetsprincipen)
- 14 decisions analyzed across 5 meetings
- Updated daily at 08:00 CET via automated pipeline
- License: CC BY 4.0 (AI summaries), public records (source data)

## Contact

Kommun Monitor is an independent civic tech project. Not affiliated with Örebro kommun.
